title: Vampire Lord heals by twice sent creature HP

card.rawText: During your turn, you may send 1 creature from your hand to your cemetery. Heal this card 2x the amount of the total HP of the sent creature.

plan.title: Vampire Lord heals by twice sent creature HP
plan.summary: After the hand creature cost is paid, verify Vampire Lord heals 2x that creature total HP.

notes: Set Vampire Lord current HP to 80 and send a hand creature to cemetery for healing.
During your turn, you may send 1 creature from your hand to your cemetery. Heal this card 2x the amount of the total HP of the sent creature.

steps: Heal by twice the sent creature total HP.
manualVerification: Verify against card text: During your turn, you may send 1 creature from your hand to your cemetery. Heal this card 2x the amount of the total HP of the sent creature.
riskNotes: A red result marks missing or incomplete runtime support for this rules text.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_084_vampire_lord-084-e02 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
